title: Palmolive Skin Radiance Papaya & Peach Blossom Shower Gel Body Wash 450ml
features: Glow-Boosting Body Wash ‚Äì Palmolive Skin Radiance Papaya & Peach Blossom Shower Gel is designed to reveal naturally radiant skin with every wash.
Infused with Natural Extracts ‚Äì Formulated with Papaya & Peach Blossom extracts, known for their brightening and revitalizing properties.
Deeply Cleanses & Hydrates ‚Äì Gently removes impurities while moisturizing and nourishing the skin, leaving it soft, smooth, and refreshed.
Luxurious, Fruity Fragrance ‚Äì Uplifting tropical scent of juicy papaya and delicate peach blossom for a truly sensory shower experience.
Dermatologically Tested ‚Äì Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, with a pH-balanced, gentle formula.
Rich, Creamy Lather ‚Äì Transforms into a luxurious foam for a pampering shower experience every time.
description: Product Description Indulge in a radiance-boosting shower experience with Palmolive Skin Radiance Papaya & Peach Blossom Body Wash. Enriched with natural extracts, this gentle yet effective cleanser deeply cleanses while moisturizing and revitalizing your skin. The tropical fusion of juicy papaya and delicate peach blossom creates an invigorating scent, transforming your shower into a luxurious escape. Dermatologically tested and suitable for all skin types, its rich, creamy lather leaves skin feeling smooth, hydrated, and glowing. Ingredients INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Coco-Glucoside, Lactic Acid, Glycol Distearate, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Glyceryl Oleate, Glyceryl Stearate, Trisodium Ethylenediamine Disuccinate, Carica Papaya Fruit Extract, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Seed Extract, Limonene, CI 14700, CI 47005.
